innovation_1.name: 基于类MRI角度频率分析的双掩码物理材质解析机制
innovation_1.contribution_statement: We identify that traditional depth estimation methods struggle with complex material inter-reflections, highlighting the critical need for explicit physical material decomposition.

innovation_2.name: 多策略自适应的分量感知统一深度估计框架
innovation_2.contribution_statement: We propose a novel pipeline consisting of an MRI-like angular frequency analysis mechanism for material parsing and a multi-strategy component-aware framework for unified depth estimation.
